content: 每次up新的角色或者复刻老角色的时候，能不能出一些灵核/金笔/印章之类的活动或者礼包？刚刚玩了没多久，什么材料都不够。就算抽了角色，也完全拉不起来，实在没有什么抽取的欲望呀
I understand that it's because they can't be used. But it really makes investing in them early a pain

I'm a new player and 24 has been one of my favourite characters both design wise and kit wise, but after getting her kit explained by someone else I found out that that adding ANY character of non-Chaos realm changes her buffs to that realm which shattered my heart into thousand pieces. This mechanic greatly limits what teams you can play her Chaos mode in. I don't see any reason for her Chaos mode to be so restrictive considering it's not even overpowered.
So with my broken heart I beg you, I beseech you! Please make it so you need at least 2 characters of non-Chaos realm to switch her out of Chaos buffs pretty please.
